page_metadata.biotools__summary: The SiMMap server statistically derives site-moiety maps which describe the relationship between moiety preferences and the physico-chemical properties of the binding site. Users input the interaction profiles of a query target protein and its docked compound.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The SiMMap server statistically derives site-moiety maps which describe the relationship between moiety preferences and the physico-chemical properties of the binding site. Users input the interaction profiles of a query target protein and its docked compound.
